name: Molded Vegetable Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Chill until it reaches the consistency of egg whites.
3. Fold in the vegetables and celery seeds.
4. Pour into a 1-quart mold and refrigerate until firm.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CAL: 17
